name: Christmas Cut-Out Cookies
recipeInstructions:
To make cookies: Beat butter and shortening with sugar until light. Add egg, milk, and vanilla extract. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together, then beat into the mixture a little at a time. Chill for 3 hours.
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Roll dough out to 1/8-inch thickness using a floured surface. Cut with floured cutters and bake on lightly greased cookie sheets for 8-10 minutes. Let cool completely.
To make frosting to spread: Mix powdered sugar, vanilla extract, water, and desired food coloring in a bowl until smooth. For intense color, use paste coloring. Frost cooled cookies with this mixture.
To make frosting to pipe: Beat butter into the powdered sugar mixture. Add water and optional coloring as desired. Pipe onto cookies for accent colors.
Yield: Approximately 3 dozen cookies, depending on cutter size.
